scripts.copy-data: mkdir -p public/data/vsop87 public/data/elpmpp02 public/data/IAU2000 && (cp ../../data/vsop87/VSOP87B.ear public/data/vsop87/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp ../../data/vsop87/VSOP87B.ear.bin public/data/vsop87/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp ../../data/vsop87/VSOP87B.ear.bin.br public/data/vsop87/ 2>/dev/null || true) && for f in ELP_MAIN.S1 ELP_MAIN.S2 ELP_MAIN.S3 ELP_PERT.S1 ELP_PERT.S2 ELP_PERT.S3; do cp ../../data/elpmpp02/$f public/data/elpmpp02/ 2>/dev/null || true; cp ../../data/elpmpp02/$f.bin public/data/elpmpp02/ 2>/dev/null || true; cp ../../data/elpmpp02/$f.bin.br public/data/elpmpp02/ 2>/dev/null || true; done && (cp ../../data/IAU2000/tab5.3a.txt public/data/IAU2000/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp ../../data/IAU2000/tab5.3a.bin public/data/IAU2000/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp ../../data/IAU2000/tab5.3a.bin.br public/data/IAU2000/ 2>/dev/null || true)
scripts.refresh-wasm: cd ../rust/wasm-lib && wasm-pack build --target web && cd ../../web && rm -rf node_modules/.vite node_modules/lunar-wasm
